referencesPageLayout.refIntroContent: Our work is truly a mirror of who, what, and how we are. Words can be woven, and promises can be made, but ultimately, the proof is in the results we deliver for you. We are proud of our work and always grateful to our customers for giving us an opportunity to exceed their expectations while meeting our own.
referencesPageLayout.refSoftwareProjectSectionContent: We have executed several projects across different domains and industries. As a full-stack developer we built customised solutions that run operations of companies in UAE and USA. As a software implementation company we have completed projects for Zoho and Salesforce.

refSoftwareProjectList.refSoftwareProjectsCategoryText: Complete business application for paperless operations for Moving Company and Insurance Brokerage and many more
Conversation and Transactional Chatbots for Trading Company and German Furniture company on WhatsApp platform with AI power.
Enabling CRM and Projects in Zoho, Salesforce, and Zoho Creator for Freight & Logistics and Citizenship Services clients in
Regional reporting solutions for German Automaker and a Swiss Confectionary giant.
Taking business online for Coffee roasting company and a store dedicated to children books and toys.
Mobile app built for start-ups and integration with legacy systems for logistics company

referencesPageLayout.digitalPortfolioSectionContent: Our digital portfolio reflects our creativity across different formats and platforms encompassing a wide range of business sectors. Each engagement is a thoughtful execution of digital strategy backed by visual design, impactful content and dependable technology.

digitalPortfolioList.digitalPortfolioContent: Corporate and Celebrity websites for different industries in Consumer, Industrial, Engineering, Real-Estate, Technology domains.
Visual design and text marketing campaigns using Twilio, SendGrid, Zoho Campaign, MailChimp.
Strategy and content for Instagram/Facebook, LinkedIn, Tiktok, and WhatsApp platforms.
Creation of digital brochures, product catalogues, multimedia graphics, and animations.
Videos for profile, products, services, company events and internal communication.

common.ctaSubtitle: Need help with a project?

nodes.content: emQube launched a modern Shopify e-commerce portal to provide a unified marketplace for wellness products and services.
nodes.title: Holistic Wellness Products & Services Marketplace

nodes.content: emQube developed a visually engaging WooCommerce store designed to simplify the discovery and purchase of educational materials and toys for children.
nodes.title: Educational E-Commerce Storefront

nodes.content: emQube deployed a robust Adobe Commerce (Magento) storefront that integrates online sales directly with the company’s backend SAP ERP system.
nodes.title: Integrated B2B & B2C E-Commerce Portal

nodes.content: emQube designed a high-impact, rich-interface Power BI dashboard for display on LED screens to monitor judicial performance and workload KPIs.
nodes.title: Judicial Performance & Workload Dashboard

nodes.content: emQube implemented Power BI dashboards to provide live financial and operational reporting, integrated directly with internal SQL Server databases.
nodes.title: Power BI Operational & Financial Reporting Suite

nodes.content: emQube migrated legacy reports to Tableau dashboards, embedded within an application to provide regional teams with inventory and sales analytics.
nodes.title: Tableau-Based Inventory Planning Dashboard

nodes.content: emQube built an AI chatbot trained on historical customer service logs to automatically answer enquiries about services, regulations, and pricing.
nodes.title: Historical-Data Trained AI Service Bot

nodes.content: emQube transformed a corporate homepage into a conversational GenAI interface, allowing visitors to query services without traditional site navigation.
nodes.title: Homepage GenAI Conversational Interface

nodes.content: emQube integrated an AI-powered chatbot into a financial broker’s website to answer visitor inquiries using the site’s own knowledge base.
nodes.title: AI-Powered Financial Enquiry Chatbot

nodes.content: emQube integrated a WhatsApp chatbot with a low-code platform to provide customers with automated, periodic updates on their furniture project progress.
nodes.title: Automated Project Progress WhatsApp Updates

nodes.content: emQube integrated a WhatsApp chatbot with the client’s back-office system to deliver automated move confirmations, schedule alerts, and customer service surveys.
nodes.title: Automated WhatsApp Service Bot

nodes.content: emQube created a robust mobile application for field crew leaders to manage relocation, storage, and furniture installation operations from start to finish.
nodes.title: Field Operations Management App

nodes.content: emQube built a comprehensive task-management and sharing tool, deployed as both a desktop platform and a Progressive Web App (PWA), for an enterprise workforce.
nodes.title: Daily Task Prioritization & Management Tool

nodes.content: emQube developed a mobile application that allows users to store, categorize, and retrieve digital receipts and appliance warranties in a centralized, secure vault.
nodes.title: Digital Warranty & Receipt Vault

nodes.content: emQube developed a secure digital registry application to manage the creation, encryption, and storage of wills for non-Muslim expatriates in Dubai.
nodes.title: Secure Digital Wills Registry Platform

nodes.content: emQube developed a comprehensive web-based platform to streamline the scheduling, tracking, and financial administration of Key Opinion Leader (KOL) interactions.
nodes.title: Pharma Expert Engagement Platform

nodes.content: emQube developed a dedicated workflow application that enables automotive regional headquarters to track, monitor, and resolve customer service escalations from local service centers.
nodes.title: Automotive Customer Escalation Portal

nodes.content: emQube implemented a menu-driven WhatsApp chatbot that allows website visitors to query product information and submit leads directly through the platform.
nodes.title: WhatsApp Conversational Enquiry Bot

nodes.content: emQube engineered a comprehensive reporting tool that consolidates multi-country sales and inventory data for a Swiss coffee company’s Middle East regional office
nodes.title: Regional Sales & Stock Consolidation Tool

nodes.content: emQube engineered a centralized web-based portal to manage MIS, inventory, and forecasting across 11 countries for a luxury automotive regional office.
nodes.title: Automotive Regional Sales & Inventory Portal

nodes.content: emQube built an integrated online portal allowing insurance brokers to manage, compare, and issue policies from multiple insurance providers for their customers.
nodes.title: Multi-Provider Insurance Aggregator Portal
